goal: batch the Docker harness across environment-fidelity-blocked instances at scale

single_instance_proven.result: base fails with real bug, gold passes, pinned Python 3.9

observed: concurrent multi-GB x86 image pulls under arm64 emulation strained the Docker daemon; an already-cached image (13480) returned a spurious PULL_FAIL under load
a serial run of a second instance (13615) completed with exit 0 but produced no captured container output - flaky stdout under emulation
batch_attempt.outcome: local batch execution unreliable in this arm64-emulation environment

environment_bound: full-dataset Docker batching belongs on a native-x86 CI runner with cached images - the standard SWE-bench execution environment - not local arm64 emulation; this is a bound on LOCAL execution, not on the method, which iter132 proved works
